    (lstm): LSTM(1, 42, num_layers=2, batch_first=True)
  )
  (pod_encoder): HiddenLSTM(
    (lstm): LSTM(2, 23, num_layers=2, batch_first=True)
  )
  (hidden_dense): HiddenDense(
    (fc1): Linear(in_features=154, out_features=160, bias=True)
  )
  (output_dense): OutputDense(
    (fc): Linear(in_features=160, out_features=200, bias=True)
  )
)
